---
title: "David Redek"
toc: false
about: 
  template: solana
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 17em
  # links:
  #   - icon: linkedin
  #     text: Linked
  #     href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/david-redek/
  #   - icon: github
  #     text: GitHub
  #     href: https://github.com/davidredek
---

david \[dot\] redek \[at\] gmail \[dot\] com

## Bio

I am a statistician, data scientist, and generally an aspiring data professional based in Copenhagen.

## Publications

[Can knowledge of the spatial field trend improve phenotypic prediction accuracy through informed choice of experimental design?](https://link.springer.com/journal/10681)

## Experience

**Statistician** \| Novo Nordisk A/S 
Copenhagen, Denmark \| Jan 2024 -- Present

**Research Assistant** \|University of Copenhagen 
Copenhagen, Denmark \| Nov 2021 -- Nov 2023

**Data Scientist** \| CGI Inc.
Prague, Czech Republic \| July 2020 -- Nov 2020

## Education

**MSc. Statistics** \| University of Copenhagen
Copenhagen, Denmark \| 2021 -- 2023

**Bc. Mathematics** \| Charles University
Prague, Czech Republic \| 2017 -- 2021
